title: Ashen + Another Furniture
description: Repaints the textures in the Another Furniture mod to match the palette of the Ashen resourcepack
body:
As it says on the tin! Repaints the textures of Another Furniture to match the desaturated color palette of Ashen 16x. Every... single... texture... all of them. Every chair variant, every couch every curtain, all of it!


Credits ~

Starfish Studios for their amazing Another Furniture mod
Aim_Boot for his wonderful Ashen 16x resourcepack
